descriptionHtml:
Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 39i for sale 2009 | 3 Cabins Version | Tax Paid

If you are searching for a well-maintained cruising yacht, this Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 39i for sale 2009 could be a suitable option. Currently located in Valencia, this vessel presents a practical combination of comfort, sailing performance, and thoughtful equipment for those considering extended journeys or coastal exploration. Registered under the Portuguese flag, her tax status is paid, offering clarity for potential buyers interested in straightforward ownership.

(Autopilot, Radar, GPS, Inverter, Solar Panels, Dishwasher, Tender...)

Specifications:

  • Location: Valencia
  • Flag of Registry: Portugal
  • Year: 2009
  • Length: 11.6 m
  • Beam: 3.8 m
  • Draft: 1.8 m
  • Tax Status: Paid
  • Fuel Tank: 140 L
  • Fresh Water Tank: 320 L
  • Holding Tank: 80 L
  • Motor: Yanmar 39.44 hp diesel, 2009, 4100 hours
  • Speed: Cruising 5 knots, Maximum 10 knots

She represents a straightforward opportunity for those wanting to step into a capable cruiser. Located in Valencia, viewing can be arranged for you. This Jeanneau Sun Odyssey 39i for sale 2009 is ready for her next chapter and stands in good condition for her age. Contact us now!
